name: EventHandler - LimitUsability
description: Verify LimitUsability EventHandler loads and can be read

steps.name: Find skill with LimitUsability
steps.code: var skill = Menace.SDK.Templates.FindAll("SkillTemplate").FirstOrDefault(s => { var eh = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty(s, "EventHandlers"); return eh != null && eh.ToString().Contains("LimitUsability"); }); skill != null ? skill.ToString() : null

steps.name: Load EventHandlers array
steps.code: var skill = Menace.SDK.Templates.FindAll("SkillTemplate").FirstOrDefault(s => { var eh = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty(s, "EventHandlers"); return eh != null && eh.ToString().Contains("LimitUsability"); }); var handlers = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty(skill, "EventHandlers"); handlers != null

steps.name: Verify _type field
steps.code: var skill = Menace.SDK.Templates.FindAll("SkillTemplate").FirstOrDefault(s => { var eh = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty(s, "EventHandlers"); return eh != null && eh.ToString().Contains("LimitUsability"); }); var handlers = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty(skill, "EventHandlers"); handlers.ToString().Contains("LimitUsability") ? true : false

steps.name: Read NotUsableIfActorHasSkill parameter
steps.code: var skill = Menace.SDK.Templates.FindAll("SkillTemplate").FirstOrDefault(s => { var eh = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty(s, "EventHandlers"); return eh != null && eh.ToString().Contains("LimitUsability"); }); var handlers = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty(skill, "EventHandlers"); handlers.ToString().Contains("NotUsableIfActorHasSkill")

steps.name: Read OnlyUsableIfActorHasSkill parameter
steps.code: var skill = Menace.SDK.Templates.FindAll("SkillTemplate").FirstOrDefault(s => { var eh = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty(s, "EventHandlers"); return eh != null && eh.ToString().Contains("LimitUsability"); }); var handlers = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty(skill, "EventHandlers"); handlers.ToString().Contains("OnlyUsableIfActorHasSkill")

steps.name: Read HiddenIfActorHasSkill parameter
steps.code: var skill = Menace.SDK.Templates.FindAll("SkillTemplate").FirstOrDefault(s => { var eh = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty(s, "EventHandlers"); return eh != null && eh.ToString().Contains("LimitUsability"); }); var handlers = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty(skill, "EventHandlers"); handlers.ToString().Contains("HiddenIfActorHasSkill")
